generated_oml:
instance SwingAngleEncoder : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures load swing dynamics"
    DTDFVocab:producedData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
]

instance Anemometer : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Measures real-time wind speed"
    DTDFVocab:producedData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
]

instance ArduinoMicrocontroller : DTDFVocab:SensingComponent [
    base:desc "Arduino-based sensor node aggregating data from Swing Angle Encoder and Anemometer at high sampling frequencies for real-time state representation"
    DTDFVocab:producedData AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted
]

instance SwingAngleDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder
]

instance WindSpeedDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom Anemometer
]

instance AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted : DTDFVocab:DataTransmitted [
    DTDFVocab:producedFrom SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer
]

instance SwingAngleData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Swing angle data from Swing Angle Encoder"
    DTDFVocab:fromData SwingAngleDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib, Docker, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance WindSpeedData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Wind speed data from Anemometer"
    DTDFVocab:fromData WindSpeedDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib, Docker, EclipseMosquitto
]

instance AggregatedSensorData : DTDFVocab:Data [
    base:desc "Aggregated sensor data for real-time state representation"
    DTDFVocab:fromData AggregatedSensorDataTransmitted
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib, Docker, EclipseMosquitto, LoggingApplication
]

instance HorizontalCartMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for horizontal cart movement with dedicated controller"
]

instance VerticalHoistMotor : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Motor for vertical hoist movement with dedicated controller"
]

instance Electromagnet : DTDFVocab:ActingComponent [
    base:desc "Electromagnet for container pickup and placement"
]

instance MotorController : DTDFVocab:Component [
    base:desc "Arduino-based controller for horizontal cart and vertical hoist motors"
]

instance LaboratoryEnvironment : DTDFVocab:Environment [
    base:desc "Laboratory environment for research and education on digital twin applications"
    base:contains SwingAngleEncoder, Anemometer, ArduinoMicrocontroller, HorizontalCartMotor, VerticalHoistMotor, Electromagnet, MotorController
]

instance CADModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Geometric representation of gantry structure"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo Docker
]

instance KinematicModel : DTDFVocab:Model [
    base:desc "Model for motion dynamics of gantry crane"
    DTDFVocab:inputTo GantryLib, Docker
]

instance TrajectoryGeneratorService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for computing optimal movement trajectories using kinematic model"
    DTDFVocab:provides OptimalTrajectoryInsight
]

instance HistoricalDataLoggingService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for time-series data storage of crane operational data"
    DTDFVocab:provides HistoricalDataInsight
]

instance DataVisualizationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for real-time system state display"
    DTDFVocab:provides RealTimeVisualizationInsight
]

instance ContinuousValidationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for ensuring model accuracy against physical system"
    DTDFVocab:provides ValidationNotificationAction
]

instance SimulationService : DTDFVocab:Service [
    base:desc "Service for dynamic behavior prediction"
]

instance OptimalTrajectoryInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Optimal movement trajectories for efficient operational strategies"
]

instance HistoricalDataInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Historical data for system analysis and validation"
]

instance RealTimeVisualizationInsight : DTDFVocab:Insight [
    base:desc "Real-time system state display for monitoring"
]

instance ValidationNotificationAction : DTDFVocab:Action [
    base:desc "Notifies operators via dashboard for appropriate action when validation fails"
    DTDFVocab:IsAutomatic false
]

instance GantryLib : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Python-based module for Physical Crane Interface and C4 container implementation"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance Docker : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Containerization technology for deployment"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, HistoricalDataLoggingService, DataVisualizationService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance TimescaleDB : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Time-series database for operational and simulation data storage"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance Grafana : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Interactive visualization tool for real-time system state display"
    DTDFVocab:enables DataVisualizationService
]

instance EclipseMosquitto : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "MQTT broker for real-time communication between physical and virtual systems"
    DTDFVocab:enables TrajectoryGeneratorService, ContinuousValidationService
]

instance LoggingApplication : DTDFVocab:Enabler [
    base:desc "Application for continuous recording of crane state data into TimescaleDB"
    DTDFVocab:enables HistoricalDataLoggingService
]

instance virtual_to_physical_interaction : DTDFVocab:VirtualToPhysical [
    base:desc "Commands from the Control Application (Python) are transmitted via the Physical Crane Interface to control the physical crane."
]

instance dt_constellation : DTDFVocab:Constellation [
    base:desc "The system employs the C4 Model for architectural visualization, utilizes containerization and virtualization technologies for deployment, and adopts an ad-hoc approach without a commercial digital twin framework."
]

instance fidelity_and_validity_considerations : DTDFVocab:FidelityConsideration [
    base:desc "A Continuous Validation Service compares executed trajectory measurements against simulation outputs, calculates distance metrics between actual and predicted states, and triggers operator alerts when deviations exceed a predefined threshold to ensure model fidelity and enable error correction."
]

instance dt_technical_connection : DTDFVocab:TechnicalConnection [
    base:desc "The system employs an MQTT broker for inter-service communication among digital twin components."
]

instance dt_hosting_deployment : DTDFVocab:Deployment [
    base:desc "The system is deployed on a personal computer (on-premise), with Database, MQTT Broker, and Dashboard C4 containers containerized using Docker. Computational and storage requirements are met locally, and scalability is limited to single-node configuration."
]

instance standardization : DTDFVocab:Standardization [
    base:desc "The system adheres to the C4 Model standard for software architecture visualization and description as specified in the documentation, with no other industry standards or compliance frameworks mentioned."
]
